content.json:
# Fortigate CEF ログ ダッシュボード

Fortigate ファイアウォールの CEF ログ (`CommonSecurityLog`) を可視化します。

---

parameters.name: FirewallName
parameters.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| distinct DeviceName
| sort by DeviceName asc
parameters.label: ファイアウォール

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| summarize
    TotalEvents = count(),
    AllowedEvents = countif(DeviceAction in ("accept", "allow", "passthrough")),
    DeniedEvents = countif(DeviceAction in ("deny", "drop", "blocked", "reject")),
    UniqueSourceIPs = dcount(SourceIP),
    UniqueDestIPs = dcount(DestinationIP),
    TotalSentMB = round(sum(toreal(SentBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    TotalReceivedMB = round(sum(toreal(ReceivedBytes)) / 1048576, 1)
content.title: サマリー統計

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| summarize Count = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), DeviceAction
| render timechart
content.title: イベント数の推移 (アクション別)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| summarize
    SentMB = round(sum(toreal(SentBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    ReceivedMB = round(sum(toreal(ReceivedBytes)) / 1048576, 1)
    by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| render timechart
content.title: トラフィック量の推移 (MB)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| summarize
    Sessions = count(),
    SentMB = round(sum(toreal(SentBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    ReceivedMB = round(sum(toreal(ReceivedBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    DistinctDestinations = dcount(DestinationIP)
    by SourceIP
| top 20 by SentMB desc
content.title: 送信元 IP トップ 20 (送信量順)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| summarize
    Sessions = count(),
    SentMB = round(sum(toreal(SentBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    ReceivedMB = round(sum(toreal(ReceivedBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    DistinctSources = dcount(SourceIP)
    by DestinationIP
| top 20 by ReceivedMB desc
content.title: 宛先 IP トップ 20 (受信量順)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where isnotempty(DestinationPort)
| summarize Sessions = count(), DistinctSources = dcount(SourceIP) by tostring(DestinationPort)
| top 20 by Sessions desc
| project DestinationPort, Sessions, DistinctSources
content.title: 宛先ポート トップ 20

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| extend AppName = extract(@"FTNTFGTapp=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| where isnotempty(AppName)
| summarize Sessions = count(), SentMB = round(sum(toreal(SentBytes)) / 1048576, 1) by AppName
| top 20 by Sessions desc
content.title: アプリケーション トップ 20

content.json: ## 拒否トラフィック分析

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where DeviceAction in ("deny", "drop", "blocked", "reject")
| summarize DeniedCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain})
| render timechart
content.title: 拒否イベント数の推移

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where DeviceAction in ("deny", "drop", "blocked", "reject")
| summarize
    DeniedCount = count(),
    DistinctDestIPs = dcount(DestinationIP),
    DistinctDestPorts = dcount(DestinationPort),
    TopPorts = make_set(DestinationPort, 5)
    by SourceIP
| top 20 by DeniedCount desc
content.title: 拒否トラフィック 送信元 IP トップ 20

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where DeviceAction in ("deny", "drop", "blocked", "reject")
| summarize DeniedCount = count() by tostring(DestinationPort)
| top 20 by DeniedCount desc
| render barchart
content.title: 拒否トラフィック ポート別分布

content.json: ## UTM セキュリティイベント (IPS / AV / Web Filter)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where Activity has_any ("utm:ips", "ips", "anomaly", "signature")
    or DeviceEventClassID has_any ("0419", "0420", "16384", "16385")
| extend AttackName = extract(@"FTNTFGTattack=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), LogSeverity
| render timechart
content.title: IPS イベント数の推移 (重大度別)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where Activity has_any ("utm:ips", "ips", "anomaly", "signature")
    or DeviceEventClassID has_any ("0419", "0420", "16384", "16385")
| extend AttackName = extract(@"FTNTFGTattack=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| where isnotempty(AttackName)
| summarize
    HitCount = count(),
    DistinctSources = dcount(SourceIP),
    DistinctTargets = dcount(DestinationIP),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by AttackName, DeviceAction, LogSeverity
| top 30 by HitCount desc
content.title: IPS シグネチャ トップ 30

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| extend VirusName = extract(@"FTNTFGTvirus=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| where isnotempty(VirusName)
| summarize
    DetectionCount = count(),
    DistinctSources = dcount(SourceIP),
    LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated)
    by VirusName, DeviceAction
| top 20 by DetectionCount desc
content.title: AV 検出ウイルス トップ 20

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| extend WebCategory = extract(@"FTNTFGTcatdesc=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| where isnotempty(WebCategory)
| where DeviceAction in ("blocked", "deny", "drop")
| summarize BlockCount = count(), DistinctUsers = dcount(DestinationUserName) by WebCategory
| top 20 by BlockCount desc
| render barchart
content.title: Web フィルタ ブロック カテゴリ トップ 20

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| extend SrcCountry = extract(@"FTNTFGTsrccountry=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| where isnotempty(SrcCountry) and SrcCountry != "Reserved"
| summarize SessionCount = count() by SrcCountry
| top 30 by SessionCount desc
content.title: 送信元国別セッション数 トップ 30

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| extend DstCountry = extract(@"FTNTFGTdstcountry=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| where isnotempty(DstCountry) and DstCountry != "Reserved"
| summarize SessionCount = count() by DstCountry
| top 30 by SessionCount desc
content.title: 宛先国別セッション数 トップ 30

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where Activity has_any ("vpn", "tunnel", "ssl-login", "ssl-new-con")
| extend VPNType = extract(@"FTNTFGTtunneltype=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), DeviceAction
| render timechart
content.title: VPN イベント推移

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| where Activity has_any ("vpn", "tunnel", "ssl-login", "ssl-new-con")
| where DeviceAction has_any ("failure", "failed", "denied", "invalid", "timeout")
| project
    TimeGenerated,
    SourceIP,
    DestinationUserName,
    DeviceAction,
    Activity,
    Message,
    DeviceName
| top 50 by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: VPN 認証失敗 (直近 50 件)

content.query:
CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor == "Fortinet" and DeviceProduct == "Fortigate"
| where '{FirewallName}' == 'value::all' or DeviceName == '{FirewallName}'
| extend PolicyID = extract(@"FTNTFGTpolicyid=(\d+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| extend PolicyName = extract(@"FTNTFGTpolicyname=([^;]+)", 1, AdditionalExtensions)
| where isnotempty(PolicyID)
| summarize
    HitCount = count(),
    SentMB = round(sum(toreal(SentBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    ReceivedMB = round(sum(toreal(ReceivedBytes)) / 1048576, 1),
    DistinctSources = dcount(SourceIP)
    by PolicyID, PolicyName, DeviceAction
| sort by HitCount desc
| take 50
content.title: ポリシー別ヒット数トップ 50
